chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1158 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 26.08.2025 Mr. J. K Jarwar, Advocate along with Petitioner (on bail). Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Since the Provincial Government of Sindh has promulgated the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025, by amending the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024 through the Sindh Government Gazette published on 18.08.2025, whereby the petitioner has been given appropriate forum for bail, therefore, this petition has become infructuous. However, learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition may be converted into an application for protective bail enabling the petitioner to appear before the appropriate forum / Special Court / Court of Sessions Judge, having jurisdiction. Learned Law Officers have no objection. Accordingly, this petition is converted into an application for protective bail, and the petitioner shall be deemed to be on protective bail for a period of seven days from today on same terms and conditions as mentioned in order dated 22.07.2025, and against the same surety, as already furnished. Office to assign proper number to the Court’s file. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
